texto: Summer fell upon Paris, with everyone still intently following his own subterranean course of passion or habit and looking up like a startled creature of the night at the blazing June sun. Now, all of a sudden, there was an impelling necessity to go away, to give a continuation or a meaning to the winter that had just gone by.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Françoise Sagan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. texto: A Strange melancholy pervades me to which I hesitate to give the grave and beautiful name of sorrow. The idea of sorrow has always appealed to me but now I am almost ashamed of its complete egoism. I have known boredom, regret, and occasionally remorse, but never sorrow. Today it envelops me like a silken web, enervating and soft, and sets me apart from everybody else.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Françoise Sagan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes.
